text.title: gcp-networking-vpc Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gcp-networking-vpc as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Allowing 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22 or using a bastion host with a public IP for SSH access.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Public SSH exposes the endpoint to brute-force and exploit attempts. IAP tunneling provides the same SSH access through HTTPS (port 443) without a public IP or bastion, authenticated by Google Identity.
